relationships.context: V uses PostCSS as a popular tool.
V uses SVGO for optimizing SVGs.
V uses Stylelint for linting CSS.
V uses Browserslist for browser support management.
V knows about Node.js v6+ support.
V is friendly with the NO_COLOR specification.
